description: Hyperparameter sweep for DFlash training convergence. Phase 1: screen 12 configs on 200K PerfectBlend at 1000 steps. Compare WandB curves to find best convergence trajectory.

base.common_overrides: training.dflash_num_anchors=512 inference.inference_num_gpus=2 training.training_num_gpus_per_node=6 training.fsdp_strategy=FULL_SHARD training.fsdp_reduce_dtype=bfloat16 training.prefetch_depth=8 training.max_checkpoints=1 training.save_interval=9999 dataset.eval_data_path=null

runs.name: R00-baseline
runs.overrides: training.learning_rate=6e-4 training.min_lr=6e-5 training.lr_decay_style=cosine training.warmup_ratio=0.04 training.weight_decay=0.01 training.draft_accumulation_steps=2 training.dflash_loss_decay_gamma=7.0

runs.name: R01-higherLR
runs.description: Higher learning rate (1e-3) with proportional min_lr
runs.overrides: training.learning_rate=1e-3 training.min_lr=1e-4 training.lr_decay_style=cosine training.warmup_ratio=0.04 training.weight_decay=0.01 training.draft_accumulation_steps=2 training.dflash_loss_decay_gamma=7.0

runs.name: R02-lowerLR
runs.description: Lower learning rate (3e-4) for smoother convergence
runs.overrides: training.learning_rate=3e-4 training.min_lr=3e-5 training.lr_decay_style=cosine training.warmup_ratio=0.04 training.weight_decay=0.01 training.draft_accumulation_steps=2 training.dflash_loss_decay_gamma=7.0

runs.name: R03-WSD
runs.description: WSD schedule: warmup-stable-decay with cosine final phase
runs.overrides: training.learning_rate=6e-4 training.min_lr=6e-5 training.lr_decay_style=WSD training.wsd_decay_ratio=0.2 training.wsd_decay_style=cosine training.warmup_ratio=0.04 training.weight_decay=0.01 training.draft_accumulation_steps=2 training.dflash_loss_decay_gamma=7.0

runs.name: R04-constantLR
runs.description: Constant LR (no decay) to test if cosine decay causes plateau
runs.overrides: training.learning_rate=6e-4 training.min_lr=6e-4 training.lr_decay_style=constant training.warmup_ratio=0.04 training.weight_decay=0.01 training.draft_accumulation_steps=2 training.dflash_loss_decay_gamma=7.0

runs.name: R05-highWD
runs.description: High weight decay (0.1) for stronger regularization
runs.overrides: training.learning_rate=6e-4 training.min_lr=6e-5 training.lr_decay_style=cosine training.warmup_ratio=0.04 training.weight_decay=0.1 training.draft_accumulation_steps=2 training.dflash_loss_decay_gamma=7.0

runs.name: R06-noWD
runs.description: No weight decay (ablation of Phase H change)
runs.overrides: training.learning_rate=6e-4 training.min_lr=6e-5 training.lr_decay_style=cosine training.warmup_ratio=0.04 training.weight_decay=0.0 training.draft_accumulation_steps=2 training.dflash_loss_decay_gamma=7.0

runs.name: R07-accum1
runs.description: accum=1 for 2x more optimizer steps per epoch (smaller effective batch)
runs.overrides: training.learning_rate=6e-4 training.min_lr=6e-5 training.lr_decay_style=cosine training.warmup_ratio=0.04 training.weight_decay=0.01 training.draft_accumulation_steps=1 training.dflash_loss_decay_gamma=7.0

runs.name: R08-longWarmup
runs.description: Longer warmup (10%) for more stable early training
runs.overrides: training.learning_rate=6e-4 training.min_lr=6e-5 training.lr_decay_style=cosine training.warmup_ratio=0.10 training.weight_decay=0.01 training.draft_accumulation_steps=2 training.dflash_loss_decay_gamma=7.0

runs.name: R09-sharpGamma
runs.description: Sharper loss decay gamma (3.0): heavier weight on early block positions
runs.overrides: training.learning_rate=6e-4 training.min_lr=6e-5 training.lr_decay_style=cosine training.warmup_ratio=0.04 training.weight_decay=0.01 training.draft_accumulation_steps=2 training.dflash_loss_decay_gamma=3.0

runs.name: R10-flatGamma
runs.description: Flatter loss decay gamma (14.0): more uniform weight across positions
runs.overrides: training.learning_rate=6e-4 training.min_lr=6e-5 training.lr_decay_style=cosine training.warmup_ratio=0.04 training.weight_decay=0.01 training.draft_accumulation_steps=2 training.dflash_loss_decay_gamma=14.0

runs.name: R11-aggressive
runs.description: Aggressive combo: higher LR + WSD + accum=1 + short warmup
runs.overrides: training.learning_rate=1e-3 training.min_lr=1e-4 training.lr_decay_style=WSD training.wsd_decay_ratio=0.2 training.wsd_decay_style=cosine training.warmup_ratio=0.02 training.weight_decay=0.01 training.draft_accumulation_steps=1 training.dflash_loss_decay_gamma=7.0
